overall.description: Static camera shot of a wizarding common room (Gryffindor common room from Hogwarts Legacy) with gothic architecture, central fireplace, and warm firelight. NPCs in wizard robes enter from the left, walk through the room, and sit in armchairs while the camera remains stationary throughout the clip.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a static view of a gothic wizarding common room illuminated by warm firelight. A single NPC sits in a leather armchair on the right, while the central stone fireplace burns steadily. The room features high arched windows, ornate chandeliers, and patterned rugs.

segments.scene_description: A wizard enters from the left doorway and walks across the room toward the seating area. At around 24 seconds, the character sits down in the leather armchair on the right. The fireplace continues to burn in the center, and the room's warm lighting remains constant.

segments.scene_description: The common room remains active with continued pedestrian traffic. A second wizard enters from the left and walks past the central fireplace toward the back of the room. The seated NPC remains in the armchair on the right, and the warm firelight continues to illuminate the gothic interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static perspective of a gothic wizarding common room as it transitions from a quiet sanctuary into a space of gentle activity. It begins with a view of the ornate interior, where warm firelight from a central stone fireplace illuminates high arched windows and a single NPC resting in a leather armchair. As the scene unfolds, a wizard enters from the left doorway and crosses the patterned rugs to join the other in the seating area. The room then becomes more active as a second wizard enters from the left, walking past the steady flames of the hearth toward the back of the room. Finally, the shot lingers on the cozy atmosphere of the common room, with the seated figures and passing students framed by the constant glow of the chandeliers and fire.
